global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple service with a free trial offer.

elements.label: Green abstract background
elements.description: A vibrant green background with abstract shapes creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center with a subtle gradient, designed to hold key information.

elements.label: Top background layer
elements.description: A lighter green area at the top, providing a soft backdrop for the headline.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A smaller, lighter green area at the top, adding depth to the overall design.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold black text stating 'Secure & simple' with a smaller tagline underneath, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Tagline text
elements.description: A smaller black text below the main message, reading 'Built for peace of mind'.

elements.label: Top decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract shape in the top left corner, adding visual interest to the ad.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: An oval shape in the center, contributing to the abstract theme of the ad.

elements.label: Center decorative shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape positioned centrally, enhancing the layout's visual appeal.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner, featuring the text 'EarnPath' in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Try for free' in bold white letters.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A bold black text displaying the price '$4.99' positioned above the call to action.
